title: tagetes persicifolia
intro: Tagetes persicifolia, also known as the Nasturtium Marigold or Lemon Marigold, is an annual herbaceous plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to South America. The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to act as an antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory agent, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Tagetes persicifolia include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety due to its calming effect on the nervous system, as well as its ability to support immune function and digestion. Herbal preparations of Tagetes persicifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to treat various health issues, such as fever, colds, and respiratory problems.
